title: MIND | FIND THE GAP
narrative:
"Between the conception
And the creation
Between the emotion
And the response
Falls the Shadow" - excerpt from The Hollow Men by T.S Eliot ,1925

MIND | FIND THE GAP directs our attention toward the space that carries the energy of change - to the transient, inscrutable place between that which we know.
to the realm that exists 'between the idea and the reality'
to the place between life as we know it and life as we never imagined
to the space between thought and action
to the place that elevates or swallows
where fortune & fortunes are lost and found
to the place that 'Falls the Shadow'

artworkAtoms.dimensions: NEON: 15ft W X 26ft W X 4ft H
